summary: Iteration 22 backend-only tests for phone verify (Twilio Verify) graceful degradation, insights has_data flag, TWILIO_WHATSAPP_FROM normalization, and telegram/dashboard regressions. All 10 tests passed.

minor.issue: When TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID is also empty (as in preview), the 503 detail is 'Twilio not configured on the server...' rather than the more specific 'Twilio Verify Service SID not configured.' — both are acceptable graceful degradation, but if the user configures ACCOUNT_SID/AUTH_TOKEN without VERIFY_SERVICE_SID they will get the more specific message. Not a bug.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py has grown to 2632 lines — recommend splitting into routers (auth, profile, projects, workers, insights, telegram, twilio) for maintainability.
Two @app.on_event('startup') handlers and one deprecated on_event pattern — migrate to FastAPI lifespan context.
TWILIO_WHATSAPP_FROM normalization at line 58 is correct — `(os.environ.get(...) or '').strip() or default` properly handles empty env vars.
seed_data_creation: None — used existing QA user which has 2 seeded workers (so has_data=true was verified structurally; a no-data user test was skipped as noted acceptable in request).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Test file /app/backend/tests/test_iteration22_phone_verify_insights.py covers phone verify graceful degradation and TWILIO_WHATSAPP_FROM default. It imports backend.server as `server` from /app/backend (sys.path prepend). Do NOT enable TWILIO_VERIFY_SERVICE_SID in .env — the whole point is graceful-503 testing. Prior iteration_21 restart-webhook test intentionally skipped per instructions. Webhook was NOT touched by iter22 (telegram/link/code was called which reclaims to preview URL — main agent may restore to production URL if needed).
rca of the issue: N/A — verification pass. All fixes from the batch (Twilio WhatsApp From default normalization at server.py:58, Twilio Verify endpoints at 393-472 with 503 graceful degradation, insights has_data flag) are working as designed.
